title: satureja calamintha var. mollis
intro: Satureja calamintha var. mollis, also known as Mountain savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja calamintha plant, which is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Mountain savory include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory problems like coughs and colds. Mountain savory can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in cooking and herbal remedies, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
